parameters.query:
WITH up AS (
  INSERT INTO system_alerts
    (fingerprint, alertname, severity, status, starts_at, ends_at,
     generator_url, summary, description, labels, annotations,
     last_updated_at)
  VALUES
    ('{{ $json.fingerprint }}',
     '{{ $json.alertname }}',
     '{{ $json.severity }}',
     '{{ $json.status }}',
     COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.starts_at }}','')::timestamptz, NOW()),
     NULLIF('{{ $json.ends_at }}','')::timestamptz,
     '{{ $json.generator_url }}',
     $pl${{ $json.summary }}$pl$,
     $pl${{ $json.description }}$pl$,
     $pl${{ $json.labels_json }}$pl$::jsonb,
     $pl${{ $json.annotations_json }}$pl$::jsonb,
     NOW())
  ON CONFLICT (fingerprint) DO UPDATE SET
    status          = EXCLUDED.status,
    ends_at         = EXCLUDED.ends_at,
    summary         = EXCLUDED.summary,
    description     = EXCLUDED.description,
    labels          = EXCLUDED.labels,
    annotations     = EXCLUDED.annotations,
    last_updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id, alertname, status
)
INSERT INTO audit_log
  (pipeline, action, pipeline_version, result, ai_parsed)
SELECT 'alert_sink',
       up.alertname || ':' || up.status,
       '1.0',
       'success',
       jsonb_build_object('alert_id', up.id,
                          'alertname', up.alertname,
                          'status', up.status,
                          'severity', '{{ $json.severity }}')
  FROM up
RETURNING id AS audit_id;

UPDATE static_context
   SET value = jsonb_build_object(
                 'state',         'paused',
                 'paused_at',     NOW()::text,
                 'paused_reason', 'auto_pause:{{ $('Flatten Alerts').first().json.alertname }}'),
       updated_at = NOW()
 WHERE key = 'system.state'
   AND (value->>'state') = 'running'
RETURNING value AS new_state;
